---
title: "Technical Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
page-layout: full
---

Welcome to my personal technical blog.

This site is built with Quarto and automatically deployed with GitHub Actions.

Here I publish:

- technical analyses of research papers;
- paper reproductions and implementation notes;
- mathematical explanations;
- Python, machine learning, and scientific computing projects;
- links to complete GitHub repositories.

## Latest posts
